questions.prompt: The set Void is empty (∅). How many Proper Subsets does an empty set have?
questions.hint: An empty set has 2⁰ = 1 subset (itself). A proper subset must be SMALLER than itself. Can ∅ be smaller than ∅?

questions.prompt: Can a set be its own Proper Subset?
questions.hint: Definition check: A proper subset must have AT LEAST one element fewer than the parent set. So it can't be exactly the same.
